title: Fill me with Thy gracious Spirit
firstLine: Fill me with Thy gracious Spirit,
publicDomainBasis: Elwood Haines Stokes (1815–1895), John Robson Sweney (1837–1899). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Fill me with Thy gracious Spirit,
Fill my longing spirit now;
Fill me with Thy hallowed presence,
Come, dear Lord, and fill me now!

sections.label: Chorus
Chorus
Chorus
sections.text:
Cleanse and comfort, bless and save me;
Fill my broken spirit now!
Thou art comforting and saving,
Thou art sweetly filling now.
